sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109740" key="u(ste/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑστέρ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, neut. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ια, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n109740.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">afterbirth,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὕστερον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
